response.justification: Bogdan has strong backend and distributed-systems experience, including real-time low-latency applications and microservices architecture, which aligns well with the fintech and agentic AI requirements. However, his resume lacks direct evidence of multi-agent AI system production experience, fintech-specific expertise, or leadership scaling engineering teams to 30+ people. His recent role at re:cinq involves some AI-agent infrastructure work, but it is not clearly at the scale or regulatory rigor required for this role.
strengths: Extensive backend and distributed-systems expertise with real-time, low-latency applications and microservices
Proven track record in scaling engineering teams and improving software development processes (e.g., TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Experience with event-driven architectures and Kubernetes deployment, showing familiarity with scalable system design
concerns: No explicit production experience with multi-agent AI systems in regulated or high-stakes commercial environments
Limited direct fintech infrastructure experience (e.g., credit systems, payment flows, embedded finance)
Lacks demonstrated leadership in scaling engineering organizations to 30+ people or developing senior technical leadership layers

key_factors.factor: Engineering leadership scale and regulatory experience
